data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'work completed summary by trade/area', but the evidence provided does not include any details or confirmation that such a summary is generated or available. The linked use case mentions various needs, including a work completed summary, but lacks explicit evidence of this feature being implemented or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the current implementation regarding the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a work completed summary by trade/area.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for work completed summary
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the report includes a work completed summary by trade/area.
